message:
feat: DISTINCT, GROUP BY, expanded SQL test coverage (IvoryWaterfall)

- Implement SELECT DISTINCT via post-execution dedup in connection layer
- Implement GROUP BY with ORDER BY/LIMIT post-processing
- Add ~30 new integration tests for SQL patterns (bd-2832)
- Remove #[ignore] from distinct_table_backed_select and aggregate_group_by_count
- Close beads: bd-f6pn, bd-2832, bd-2yfi, bd-3fi9, bd-362m, bd-2mnb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
